programme.title: BBC World News Outside Source
programme.desc: Live from the heart of the BBC newsroom, the programme that gathers the latest information as it arrives from news wires, video feeds and social media on the biggest stories of the day.

programme.title: PBS NewsHour
programme.desc: An analysis of current events with a news summary, discussions, and news features.

programme.title: Cycle of Health
programme.desc: Physicians bring to life compelling stories of how physical and emotion well being is just as effective in delivering good health as exercise and diet. Stories shared about people pursuing healthy and happy lives.

programme.title: Second Opinion: Taking Charge of Your Health Care: Rheumatoid Arthritis
programme.desc: Treatments that can halt destruction of the body from Rheumatoid arthritis are discussed.

programme.title: 800 Words
programme.desc: Tracey eventually uncovers the truth as Woody discovers something that can't be hidden. Shay gets more unwelcome attention from Ollie.

programme.title: 800 Words
programme.desc: George longs for solitude but his plan to get rid of his unwanted guests backfires.

programme.title: Last Tango in Halifax

programme.title: Amanpour and Company
programme.desc: In-depth conversations with global thought leaders and cultural influencers.

programme.title: POV Shorts: Post-Colonial Queer
programme.desc: A showcase of independent films and documentaries presented from a unique point of view.

programme.title: The National Parks: America's Best Idea: The Scripture of Nature (1851-1890)
programme.desc: California's beautiful Yosemite Valley was ripe for exploitation in 1851, when word spread across the country of its lovely scenery. By 1864, Congress passed an act protecting the land from commercial development in an attempt to keep it pristine.

programme.title: Operation Maneater: Polar Bear
programme.desc: Inspect a warning system to deter bears and a controversial experiment to keep them away from town.

programme.title: WWII Mega Weapons: Battleship Yamato

programme.title: Nova: Ghosts of Stonehenge

programme.title: Sit and Be Fit: Grow Strong Effortlessly

programme.title: Peg + Cat: The Pentagirls Problem/ The Tree Problem of National Importance
programme.desc: The Pentagirls get to record with the famous Worm, but this really big break starts to break up the band. Peg and Cat must save the nation from humiliation when the Vice President is stuck atop a monument that's 170 feet tall.

programme.title: Cyberchase: Ecohaven Ooze
programme.desc: When Hacker learns that the ooze that feeds the animals of EcoHaven, also gives him a massive energy boost, he builds a fort around the pond. The CyberSquad uses the myth of the Trojan Horse and builds a giant 'Trojan Ducky' to fool Hacker.

programme.title: Molly of Denali: Busy Beaver/ The Night Waters
programme.desc: The kids must redirect the stream to save Trini's strawberries when a beaver family builds a dam that diverts the water to Trini's garden. Then, on her first camping trip, Trini is determined to earn her first badge: the Night Waters Badge.

programme.title: Nova: Mystery Beneath the Ice
programme.desc: Dive under the ice to explore Antarctica’s under-ice landscape with a team of scientists as they search for the mystery killer that’s decimating the population of delicate shrimp-like creatures at the foundation of the Antarctic food chain.

programme.title: History Detectives: PsychoPhone/ War Dog Letter/ Pancho Villa Watch Fob
programme.desc: A Cincinnati couple acquired a peculiar phonograph they believe was created by Edison to communicate from the dead. A WWII collector has a cryptic letter written from one soldier to another about training dogs for war.

programme.title: Nature: Yosemite
programme.desc: Yosemite is a land forged in wildfire and sculpted by water, but with climate change, water is scarcer and fire more common. Join scientists and adventurers to investigate how these global changes are affecting one of America’s greatest wildernesses.

programme.title: Nature: Forest of the Lynx
programme.desc: Travel deep into the remote forests of the Kalkalpen National Park in Austria, the largest area of wilderness in the Alps.

programme.title: Nova: Mystery Beneath the Ice
programme.desc: Dive under the ice to explore Antarctica’s under-ice landscape with a team of scientists as they search for the mystery killer that’s decimating the population of delicate shrimp-like creatures at the foundation of the Antarctic food chain.

programme.title: The Greeks: Chasing Greatness
programme.desc: An ancient legacy is invoked in Athens and at the steps of the U.S. Supreme Court. Take a look back at its rise and fall, which might not only help us understand the challenges we face now, but also point toward a better future.

programme.title: American Masters: Margaret Mitchell: American Rebel
programme.desc: Explores the life and times of 'Gone With the Wind' author Margaret Mitchell, who challenged the position of women in the South and struggled with the changing social landscape of her time.

programme.title: Civilizations: The Cult of Progress
programme.desc: Examine the rise and fall of 'progress' as an ideology, and see how the 'civilizing' project that arose from Enlightenment ideas was fraught with contradictions that troubled European artists in different ways.

programme.title: American Experience: Chasing the Moon
programme.desc: Experience the thrilling era of the space race, from its earliest days to the 1969 moon landing. A fascinating mix of scientific innovation, political calculation, media spectacle and personal drama, the series brings the Space Age to vivid life.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Intersecting Lives
programme.desc: A corrections officer is arrested for sexually assaulting female inmates in and out of prison, and the union that supports him targets Barba and the SVU.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Natural Born Storyteller

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Second Line

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Collateral Damage
programme.desc: After a navy lieutenant dies during a clandestine visit to a general's hotel room, Special Agent Pride and the team are asked to break standard protocol for the murder investigation.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Help Wanted

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Third Man

programme.title: Bones: The Feet on the Beach

programme.title: Bones: The Truth in the Myth
programme.desc: The remains of a mythbuster television show host are found in the wilderness, appearing to have been killed by the mythic Chupacabra, a reptile-mammal hybrid creature whose existence has not been confirmed.

programme.title: Movie: Gladiator

programme.title: Movie: The Hunted

programme.desc: Doug and Deacon will stop at nothing to watch the Super Bowl on HDTV.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Horizontal Hold
programme.desc: Carrie and Doug ban sex for two weeks, forcing them to resolve their conflicts verbally.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Inner Tube
programme.desc: Doug's guilty conscience leads to a spoof in which he appears on a number of TV shows.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Papa Pill

programme.title: The King of Queens: Package Deal
programme.desc: Doug quits his job to work for a competitor and Carrie develops a tanning cream addiction.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie have different opinions about Deacon and Kelly's recent separation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Departure Time
programme.desc: When Doug goes to meet his parents at the airport, they ask him to sign their living will.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Swim Neighbors
programme.desc: Carrie plunges into a lawsuit with the neighbours who have built a swimming pool.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: Killer Affair
programme.desc: Days after a pregnant elementary school teacher disappears, her boyfriend goes in front of TV cameras and tearfully pleads for her return. But investigators soon discover the grieving boyfriend may have had more than one reason to cry.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: Date With the Devil
programme.desc: Recently-divorced mom Ingrid Lyne dips her toes back into the dating scene and meets a man online. But her date at a baseball game would be her last. The next day investigators are shocked by a chilling crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Message in a Bottle
programme.desc: When an attractive young Missouri woman is found dead in her apartment, police meticulously generate a suspect list a mile long. The culprit turns out to be the most unlikely suspect with an insatiable lust for power and control.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sharper Image
programme.desc: After a girl was killed, investigators learn that cutting-edge technologies from NASA prove that the arrested suspect was not the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Laundry
programme.desc: A Northern Kentucky businessman is shot to death at his home in front of his wife. Police launch a massive manhunt to find the culprit, but their efforts were futile. A baseball bat and forensic investigation break the case wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Drowning Sorrows
programme.desc: A family vacation turns tragic when a family matriarch suffers a tragic fall to her death. The circumstances surround the fall lead the investigators to think foul play was involved. Findings from a pathologist confirm their doubts.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As Fault
programme.desc: A young mother goes missing after a night out. Police suspect foul play and begin looking into the woman's strained family life for answers. When the case goes from missing persons to homicide, a man claims an accident was to blame.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Ties
programme.desc: An esteemed couple is brutally attacked in their home, leaving one dead and the other gravely injured. The survivor identifies the killer but recants her admission leaving investigators probing for answers. A DNA hit captures the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: An apparent suicide turns out to be a much more menacing scenario involving a black widow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gone Ballistic
programme.desc: When a middle-aged man is gunned down in his own home, the motive appears to be robbery, but a mysterious greeting card blows the investigation wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeing Red
programme.desc: A high school student vanishes without a trace. False leads force detectives to work double time until a prostitute's murder demands police attention and the possibility arises that the same killer may have struck twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Finger Pane
programme.desc: Texas City police fear the work of a serial killer after two young women are found dead in the same field. They have little to go on until a third woman comes forward claiming she's the one who got away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freedom Fighter
programme.desc: 15 years after a murder and conviction, a letter from prison sets off a chain of events that has investigators exhuming a body and looking for evidence to find out if they convicted the real killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dog Day Afternoon
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her Florida home, and evidence at the scene is scarce. All signs point to burglary. The case goes cold until police get a tip from a canine behaviorist who points them in a different direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writing on the Wall
programme.desc: A gorgeous flight attendant is brutally murdered in her own home and the laundry list of suspects is growing by the minute. A striking clue at the scene leads investigators in the wrong direction, but will forensic evidence get them back on track?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hundreds of Reasons
programme.desc: A well-liked assistant manager of a Florida steakhouse in murdered while he closes his restaurant for the night.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Feet
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from her late-night job at a Florida convenience store. After she is found raped and strangled, investigators know the only way to pin down her killer will be through DNA analysis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: 'The Tracey Frame Case' - after a passer-by spots a wild fire in a secluded parking lot, police discover a dreadful homicide. It takes days to identify the victim, and most of the evidence is lost when firefighters extinguish the blaze.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Two in a Million
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family are executed in their own home. For three years the murders went unsolved, until a 30-year-old box of bullets and some iridescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Brew
programme.desc: When the head of the Coors Brewing Company is kidnapped and held for ransom, it kicked off one of the most intense manhunts in American history. See how forensic science helped track down the kidnappers.

programme.title: The Killer Truth
programme.desc: There are two sides to every story, but in a murder, one side dies with the victim. Each episode of 'The Killer Truth' tells the story of a single murder through the five people most intimately connected to the case.

programme.desc: Kevin Patrick Stoeser is caught looking at lewd pictures in a halfway house following his release. Knowing this will put him back behind bars, he flees and has been on the run ever since.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Hearts of Darkness

programme.title: Building Giants
programme.desc: A series detailing how modern technology is enabling giant superstructures to be built.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Paternity Test

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: That Was Then This Is Now
programme.desc: Caitlyn is receiving a special award at the ESPYs, but with Kris still sore over public comments Caitlyn made about their marriage, the daughters must find a way to support Caitlyn while still being sensitive to Kris's feelings.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Price You Pay

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Rites of Passage
programme.desc: When Kylie graduates from high school, Kris decides to throw an extra special party. Kim's pregnancy cravings take her half way around the world. Khloé responds to a presence in her house by getting in touch with her psychic side.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Return From Paradise
programme.desc: With only a few days left in paradise, Kendall and Kylie try to sort out their differences while Kim and Khloé help Kourtney try to forget Scott and get her mojo back. When the family returns home, a visit from Scott throws them all for a loop.

programme.title: Las Vegas: The Burning Bedouin

programme.title: Las Vegas: Bare Chested in the Park

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Ain't That Dandy

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Not a Speck
programme.desc: A Spanish cuisine expert and a Portuguese chef come to duke it out.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Sour With The Sweet

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Greeking Out
programme.desc: The kitchen goes metal when Iron Chef Jose Garces and Worst Cooks in America's Anne Burrell team up to take down their good friend, Bobby Flay. They've handpicked "Tagine Queen" Aneesa Waheed and hard-hitting chef Ryan Lory to deliver the win.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Skirting By
programme.desc: It's an East coast battle when Rhode Island's Robert Sisca and Atlantic City's Michael Brennan duke it out in the kitchen.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Summer Lovin'
programme.desc: The summer heat wave takes hold of the kitchen, and Chef Carla Hall tries to beat the heat with TV announcer Steve Higgins. They recruit red-hot chefs Kathy Sidell and Vinson Petrillo to light a fire under Bobby Flay and take him out.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Take Him to Fresno
programme.desc: Atlanta chef Chad Clevenger and Puerto Rican-born chef Anita Cartagena are prepped and ready to battle it out in the arena. Food Network's Alex Guarnaschelli and actor Ben Rappaport referee this heavyweight fight for the chance to take on Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: The Ginger Monkey Is Going Under

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Don't Drop The Beat (Bobby)!

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Killer Instinct
programme.desc: With winter fast approaching, the Last Alaskans set out to hunt moose. Heimo and Edna team up together. Tyler draws on gut instinct to stalk an elusive bull. And Charlie soon discovers why the area is called 'Starvation Country.'

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Spirit of the Hunter
programme.desc: With winter just weeks away, The Last Alaskans are desperate to fill their smokehouses. The Selden's all pitch in to haul home Tyler's recent moose kill. Heimo and Charlie both worry they might not have meat for the winter months ahead.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Pray for Snow
programme.desc: Winter in the Arctic Refuge usually means go time for The Last Alaskans but this year low snowfall is slowing them down - snow machines and dogsleds are useless in these trail conditions.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Race Against the Sun

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Heart of the Wild

programme.title: River Monsters: Invisible Executioner
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade takes on Africa's wild Zambezi River to unmask an invisible predator that's dragging fisherman to their deaths.

programme.title: River Monsters: American Killers
programme.desc: Angler Jeremy Wade normally travels into the most remote regions searching for freshwater monsters, but recently he's been getting reports of killers from an unexpected location, America.

programme.title: River Monsters: Rift Valley Killers
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to Africa's Rift Valley to explore the roots of fishing and the monsters the first fishermen faced; it's a dangerous place filled with killer crocs, hippos and warring gangs, but at its heart is a worthy prize: the Nile perch.

programme.title: Martin: I've Got a Secret

programme.title: Martin: Do the Fight Thing

programme.desc: Nikki buys a burial plot for herself and Professor Oglevee from a shady undertaker.

programme.title: The Parkers: Mama, I'm Baaack

programme.title: Black-ish: Parental Guidance
programme.desc: Dre, determined to make up for the no-frills, last-minute wedding he and Bow had, organizes an amazing vow renewal for their 15th anniversary, but when Bow's hippie-dippy parents show up unannounced, bombshells are dropped and old disagreements re-ignite.

programme.title: Black-ish: 30 Something
programme.desc: Dre hurts himself playing basketball right before his 40th birthday. He hands the planning over to his much younger assistant fearing he really is getting too old to be cool. Bow and Ruby face off over who gets Dre the best gift.

programme.title: Black-ish: Sex, Lies and Vasectomies
programme.desc: Bow learns from her colleague that Dre never had the vasectomy a few years back that was supposedly scheduled, so she decides to see if he’ll come clean and tell the truth.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Real World

programme.title: Black-ish: Switch Hitting
programme.desc: When super cool and white exec Jay Sloane challenges Dre over his street cred and picks inept Charlie for a big urban market account, Dre finds himself questioning his 'blackness.' Pops gets a letter from the IRS and fears the worst.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Peer-ent Trap

programme.title: Black-ish: Please Don't Ask, Please Don't Tell

programme.title: Black-ish: Elephant in the Room

programme.title: Love It or List It: A Couple Is Torn Between Fixing Up Their Home in the City or Moving to the Country for More Land
programme.desc: Thomas and Sarah purchased their home near the city in a neighbourhood close to where Thomas grew up. Thomas loves the location, but Sarah feels the cramped quarters confine her. She wants an open concept, but it must be in the country.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Rhapsody in Beige and A Pain in the Deck

programme.title: Flip or Flop: A Frantic Fiasco

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Risky Business: Broken Flip

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Flipper vs. Flipper

programme.title: Pool Kings: Stay the Course
programme.desc: The Pool Kings head to Austin, Texas to build a pool alongside a golf course. The guys have their work cut out for them as they work to create a feature-filled pool that works in all seasons, provides privacy from golfers and matches the new patio.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Mountain Lake Resort Pool
programme.desc: An active family in southern California wants an extravagant pool to remind them of their favorite lakeside vacations. The kings don't know which is bigger, their clients' wish list or the 20-foot jumping cliff they have to create from scratch.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Hole in the Plan
programme.desc: An active Florida family recently traded in the tropical life for the cool countryside in Auburntown, Tennessee.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Hawaiian Paradise Pool
programme.desc: Hawaii may be 3,000 miles away, but the kings are able to recreate the island paradise right outside this family's door. They turn the Ritters' old yard into a luxurious lagoon and give them a dreamy spot to make lots of new memories.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Twice as Nice
programme.desc: A Kentucky couple seeks out the kings to help them revamp their worn-out lakeside swimming pool. The guys accept the challenge and turn the eyesore into a backyard paradise complete with a custom slide, secondary pool and more.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Cliffside Dreams
programme.desc: A couple with a crew of rambunctious kids and a dream house in San Antonio is in desperate need of a pool. The kings design an expansive pool with a Baja shelf, swim-up bar, giant infinity edge and massive two-storey deck to enjoy the view.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Swimming With the Fishes

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Backyard or Water Park?
programme.desc: Why go on vacation when you have your own resort-worthy pool right in your own backyard?

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Green With Envy
programme.desc: Lucas and the crew have their work cut out for them as a client's demands leave him reluctant. A Caribbean destination that includes green rocks and a sand bottom salt-water pool is the client's request.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Castle by the Sea
programme.desc: Lucas faces an epic challenge building a pool fit for a Roman palace on the Gulf of Mexico. Lucas journeys far outside his comfort zone and even taps Emperor Caesar for help on his quest to fulfill his clients' dream of living in a castle by the sea.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Three Rivers and a Pool
programme.desc: A couple want an alluring yard that incorporates the beauty of their cliff-side property. The enlarged yard area gets a deck bisected by a faux stream, a feature-filled pool with stone slab bridge, jumping boulders and even a slide.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Water, Water Everywhere
programme.desc: An active family in Austin, Texas, wants their own pool so they can spend time together outdoors at home and entertain their friends. Steve and Justin design a beautiful, feature-packed pool with copper scuppers and floating steps.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Something for Everyone
programme.desc: A family in San Antonio, Texas, is remodeling their home and they want a custom pool that has something for everyone. Paul and Tony design a 13-foot-high, split-level pool with a baja shelf for Mom and plenty of entertainment space for Dad.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Splash of Hawaii
programme.desc: A couple that moved from Hawaii to take care of a family member in Texas wants to recreate their outdoor lanai lifestyle. Justin McGuire and Steve Terry must use everything they have to turn their rocky Austin hilltop into a tropical paradise.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Dream Pool
programme.desc: Vic and Yukari had to leave their beloved pool behind when they moved into a California community. Brian and Paul must create an epic pool in the couple's new, small space, and the design includes an exposed acrylic wall holding back water.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Million Dollar View Pool
programme.desc: The King family seeks help building their new palace in the sunny hills of California. The Pool Kings find themselves between a rock ledge and hard design while bringing this build to life on a sloped property.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Clean Lines and Clean Water
programme.desc: A family's three daughters can't get enough of swimming, but their mom's chlorine sensitivity prevents her from joining in on the fun at the community pool. A special ozone system is installed that will allow her to swim.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Champagne Spa Wishes and Forever-home Dreams

programme.title: House Hunters Renovation: Beach Budget Blowout
programme.desc: A Manhattan Beach, California, family of five hopes to stay close to the beach while finding more space. Affordable homes in their dream location all require renovation.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Souperman
programme.desc: Noah Cappe ventures to the land of cheese for the Wisconsin State Fair and is greeted with the ooey-gooey French Onion Soup'r Stick.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Super Spicy

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Terrific Italian

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Gourmets of the Galaxy
programme.desc: The Iowa State Fair welcomes Noah Cappe with a trio of meaty masterpieces, but it's the double Dutch almond funnel that has everyone jumping with joy.

programme.desc: Noah Cappe makes a visit to the world-famous Iowa State Fair to sample some award-winning new items. There's a new take on chicken and waffles and a massive meat meal all wrapped up to eat on the midway.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Festival Of Fries

programme.desc: Pip and Freddy have to deliver a monkey; K.C. cooks something for a baby hippo.

programme.desc: Gekko finds a crystal that gives him powers, but it turns out the powers are too strong! While Gekko tries to stop the Ninjalinos on his own, Night Ninja tries to take over HQ!

programme.desc: The pups go to Australia and get a fishy friend.

programme.desc: Pip and Freddy show Peggy, the Polar Bear, the benefits of having a baby brother when she tries to return him to T.O.T.S. Pip and Freddy brave the desert heat to deliver a camel.

programme.title: Bluey: Pirates / Chickenrat /Neighbours
programme.desc: Bluey, Bingo and Missy pretend to be pirates; Bingo loses her favourite toy right before bedtime; Bluey builds a new pretend house.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Bark Bowl / When Hedgie Met Sallie
programme.desc: The pups get trained by a puppyball expert for the puppyball championship. Hedgie helps the pups catch the veggie bandit in Bob's vegetable patch.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A Seat at the Theatre/ Bye Bye Butterfly
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly help a butterfly get home to its family in Mexico. The pugs push Bob's office chair to a theater to see his favorite play.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Windy City/ Sham-pooch
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to the Windy City for Bob's kite! Keia is nervous about going to the groomer, so the pugs make it their mission to help her.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Give 'Em the Boot / Tik Tok, Broken Clock
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly search for the perfect pair of cowboy boots so Bob can go line dancing during his Texas road trip. Then, when Bob discovers the clock tower in a small town he's visiting is broken, the pugs go on a mission to fix it.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Hiccup Hazard/ The Great Robot Race
programme.desc: Pip’s hiccups threaten their delivery so he asks Freddy to do the impossible: scare them out of him. Pip and Freddy have to prove that delivery birds are better than a stork drone.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Night at the Nursery/ Seas the Day
programme.desc: A tenacious penguin and a kind hearted flamingo train to be delivery birds.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Caution: Kids at Work! / The Snoozy Doozy Pet and Breakfast!
programme.desc: Buddy is Mickey's number one fan, and he can't wait to get to work for Mini=Mechanics day. Then, The Happy Helpers need to transform the Snoozy-Doozy into a pet hotel when they get so many pet-sitting requests.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Villian of the Sky/Protector of the Sky
programme.desc: The PJ Masks discover Romeo's Sky Factory and send PJ Robot as a mole. When the Sky Factory creates a pollution cloud over the city, the PJ Masks have a hard time blowing it away!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: How ARF Got His Bark Back / Sir Bob
programme.desc: When Bob can't fix ARF's voice box, Bingo and Rolly race to find an inventor. Bob's favorite knight goes missing at a jousting event, plunging the Pugs on a mission to find him!

programme.title: Bluey: Backpackers / The Adventure / Copycat
programme.desc: Mum and Dad go on an adventure with the kids; Bluey and Chloe have an imaginary adventure together; Bluey decides to copy Dad.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Beaker 2.0/When You Wish Upon a Rizzo
programme.desc: Bunsen creates a Beaker 2.0; The Muppet Babies are visited by Rizzo the Genie.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: To Serve and Protect/ Kickin' It Old School
programme.desc: Simon is ecstatic when he's elected the school's safety monitor, but when Alvin goofs off at school, Simon has to choose between doing the right thing or giving Alvin detention. Dave takes away the Chipmunks technology.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Mojo Missing/ Who's the Animal
programme.desc: Alvin is convinced his mojo was in a cap he gave to a fan, and must find a way to get his hat back before the Chipmunks' big concert. During a costume visit to the zoo, Alvin finds himself mistaken for the real Tasmanian devil.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Slippin Thru My Fingers/ Driving Dave Crazy
programme.desc: In order to get Dave off their backs, the Chipmunks decide to find him a new girlfriend. Dave orders the Chipmunks to clean their room, but in the process, they accidentally ruin Dave's new song for the music festival.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Good Luck Mr. Whiskers/ Who's Your Daddy
programme.desc: Theodore is convinced that Miss Croner's missing cat is the cause of a terrible curse. When Dave comes down with a bad cold, Alvin quickly offers to take over Dad duty.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Dadlantis/ Chloe Rules!
programme.desc: Timmy and Chloe become eco-warriors when they save the underwater city of Atlantis from a dangerous 'sea monster.' Timmy regrets wishing Chloe was the school hall monitor when he sees how seriously she takes the job.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Knitwits/ Dimmsdale's Got Talent?
programme.desc: Dad takes Mom on what he thinks is a knight-themed cruise to renew their vows, but it's really a knitting cruise. Mr. Bickels hosts a talent show and everyone gets in, but Timmy.

programme.title: Young Dylan: Plain Faces
programme.desc: Dylan doesn't want to attend school, and does whatever it takes to avoid going, including convincing little Charlie not to go, either.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Certifiable Super Sitter
programme.desc: Chloe meets Poof for the first time when he comes home from school on Spring Break. Cosmo and Wanda win a free French Dinner, so Chloe gets to babysit Poof and his friends. All goes well until Vicky shows up.

programme.title: The Loud House: Senior Moment
programme.desc: Lori regrets everything she hasn't done in high school, and vows to make up for lost time in her senior year.

programme.title: The Loud House: Driving Miss Hazy/ No Guts, No Glori
programme.desc: Tired of doing favors to get a ride from Lori, Lincoln decides it's time to help Leni pass her driver's test. Lincoln conspires with the rest of his sisters to overthrow Lori's tyranny as their babysitter.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Splinter/ Slide Whistle Stooges
programme.desc: SpongeBob accidentally gets a splinter, but he's afraid Mr. Krabs will send him home.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Life in a Day/ Sun Bleached
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick try to live a life of extreme danger. SpongeBob and Patrick become obsessed with tanning.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Giant Squidward/ No Nose Knows
programme.desc: When Squidward gets spritzed with plant growth spray, he becomes monstrously huge. Patrick gets a nose.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patty Caper/ Plankton's Regular
programme.desc: The secret ingredient in the Krabby Patty is stolen; the Chum Bucket gets a new customer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Boating Buddies/ Krabby Kronicle
programme.desc: Squidward is forced to attend Boating School with SpongeBob.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Slumber Party/ Grooming Gary
programme.desc: Mr. Krab's enlists SpongeBob's help to be an undercover spy at Pearl's slumber party.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squidtastic Voyage/ That's No Lady
programme.desc: Spongebob and Patrick shrink and travel inside Squidward's body; Patrick thinks that he must get out of town.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Born to Be Wild/ Best Frenemies
programme.desc: Spongebob must protect the town from a biker gang; new smoothies are the talk of the town.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Thing/ Hocus Pocus
programme.desc: When Squidward is totally covered in mud, leaves and gunk, the residents of Bikini Bottom think he's some sort of monster coming to terrorize the town. Later, Spongebob gets a brand new magic kit and, after practicing all day, tries to show off.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sweet and Sour Squidward/ The Googly Artiste

programme.desc: SpongeBob, Patrick, Squidward and Mr. Krabs are swept away by a giant wave.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insulated Evidence
programme.desc: A young college student is found strangled and badly burned. Investigators get a break when a trace evidence expert uncovers the murder weapon in the spool of a vacuum.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Hearted
programme.desc: After a man dies with no proof of foul play, investigators learn that another man died the exact same way six years earlier. The men had one thing in common: at the time of their deaths, they were married to the same woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Constructive Critcism
programme.desc: When a man is found dead, having been stabbed 46 times, and police are stuck sifting through the DNA. After an arduous search, they find their killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home Evasion
programme.desc: A husband finds his wife shot outside of their home and she mutters the name of her apparent assailant just before her death. It takes fingerprint comparison, handwriting analysis, ballistics, and DNA testing for the true killer to be revealed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Calculated Coincidence
programme.desc: There is little evidence at the crime scene until investigators discover a link between their prime suspect and an unsolved murder committed six years earlier in a different state.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sworded Scheme
programme.desc: A college student goes missing, and investigators discover blood spatter in her boyfriend’s bedroom. Blood spatter someone has gone to great lengths to conceal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Touch of Evil
programme.desc: A dismembered body is dumped on the side of the New Jersey Turnpike and before police realize it, bodies are turning up between two states. A serial killer emerges, targeting Manhattan's gay community.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Textbook Murder
programme.desc: A woman is brutally murdered and police point to her fiancé when they learn that he was having affairs with other women. It is not until a man comes forward with information that he is no longer a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skeleton Key
programme.desc: Police think an abusive ex-boyfriend is to blame for a young woman's disappearance, but a set of keys discovered in her vehicle don't match up with either the ex-boyfriend or the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Funeral Services
programme.desc: A son calls 9-1-1 after finding his father dead in their home. When investigators arrive, an unknown male suspect is inside, but ballistic evidence points to someone else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Survivor
programme.desc: A college student vanished without a trace, and dirt on a pair of shoes reveals the extent of one man's deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insignificant Others
programme.desc: A man's wife had taken her own life, and his college sweetheart had killed herself in much the same fashion fourteen years earlier. Investigators had to determine if this was a coincidence or an attempt to get away with murder twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Innocence
programme.desc: When a prominent criminal defence attorney is found murdered in his own home, police suspect it may have come at the hands of one of his questionable clientele.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All 'Butt' Certain
programme.desc: A woman is convinced her husband is innocent of murder and conducted her own investigation to prove it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Best Foot Forward

programme.title: Forensic Files: Purebread Murder

programme.title: Forensic Files: Filtered Out

programme.desc: Melissa and her groom share their love at a Hollywood inspired affair, while Laura's waterside wedding is accented with Penn State flair. Audrianna's guests enjoy the glamour at her boat house venue and Dee's guests make their own favours at a candle bar.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Leprechaun
programme.desc: Mandy's alcohol theme keeps her reception guests happy, while Lindsey finds a leprechaun and spares no expense to impress her crowd.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and Dancing Zombies
programme.desc: Tinisha wants to impress with banquet hall surprises, while Rachel plans to have a tumbling flower girl and theatrics.

programme.title: Taken at Birth: Black Market Baby Dealer
programme.desc: In the 1950s and 1960s, a doctor named Thomas Hicks illegally sold over 200 babies on the black market. Now, lead investigator, Jane Blasio, is working to reunite stolen babies with biological families while trying to unearth secrets about Hicks himself.

programme.title: Taken at Birth: Forced Delivery
programme.desc: Jane discovers a suspicious pattern of babies with extremely low birth weights coming out of the clinic. Chris makes a discovery of his own, Dr. Hicks may have hidden birth records in his mausoleum. Diane hopes to meet her biological father.

programme.title: Taken at Birth: Mausoleum Break-in
programme.desc: Jane and Lisa meet the first Hicks baby, Stephen Dilbeck. They work to find his family and solve the mystery of why Hicks sold that first baby. Chris and Dr. Hicks' granddaughter Sallie bust open the mausoleum in search of birth records.

programme.title: Taken at Birth: Unexpected Revelations
programme.desc: After 70 years of searching, Stephen Dilbeck gets some shocking information about his birth family from Jane and Lisa. Meanwhile, Chris and Sallie work on getting approval of an exhumation that will answer questions for hundreds of Hicks babies.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Bold Bites Brought Home
programme.desc: Since the Fieri Family loves both cooking at home and great restaurant food, they're combining the best of both worlds with some Triple-D style takeout.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: The Memphis Barbecue Tour
programme.desc: While in Memphis, Guy samples pulled pork sandwiches and barbecue spaghetti.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Beef to Bao
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's digging into dishes from beef to buns. In Logan, Utah, a joint servin' up worldwide flavor, like lomo saltado and a funky peanut butter burger.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Regional Favorites
programme.desc: Guy Fieri travels from the east coast to the southwest in search of regional specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Off the Beaten Path
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's taking a detour to find some not-your-everyday eats. In Richmond, Va., a jammin' Jamaican joint serving outrageous oxtail and fried chicken with true island flavour.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Real Deal BBQ
programme.desc: Guy seeks out authentic barbecue restaurants around the country.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Kickin' It in Cancun
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's headin' south of the border to dig into Cancun cuisine, like an authentic, family-owned spot where grandma's cookin' up real-deal rellenos and killer chicharron gorditas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Unlikely Partners
programme.desc: Guy checks out some unique combos in Los Angeles and in Toronto.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: BBQ, Burgers and Beyond
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy's biting into burgers and barbecue. First up, he heads back to an O.G. Triple D BBQ joint in Oklahoma City to see what they're smokin' these days. Then, in Roy, Utah, a burger biz flippin' patties for the third generation.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: International Family Style
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy is taking a seat at some family restaurants. He stops at a sibling-run Vietnamese place in Utah serving authentic dishes using family recipes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From North To South America
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is diggin' into flavours that span the Americas. In Charlotte, N.C., he visits a brewery serving the bomb bacon jam burger and a dynamite duck confit flatbread. In Cancun, Mexico, a lights-out spot takes street tacos to a whole new level.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Kinds of Fast Food
programme.desc: Guy Fieri tracks down fast food done right: In New Mexico, legendary green chile cheeseburgers; in Omaha, deep fried tacos and in Connecticut, scratch made combo hotdogs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Big Food, Small Towns
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's stopping in small towns to dig in to big-time eats. In Raymond, N.H., a blow-your-mind butchery loadin' up their burgers and crankin' out scratch-made corn dogs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Off the Hook Specials
programme.desc: Guy Fieri tries a chili and tator-tot pizza at a Kansas City joint run by a sculptor.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: BBQ, Burgers and Beyond
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy's biting into burgers and barbecue. First up, he heads back to an O.G. Triple D BBQ joint in Oklahoma City to see what they're smokin' these days. Then, in Roy, Utah, a burger biz flippin' patties for the third generation.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mega Meat and Sweet Treats
programme.desc: Guy Fieri dives into mega meat and a little bit of sweet. In Atlanta, a Korean-taqueria mashing up unique flavors in their chicken tacos and bulgogi fries.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: British, Hawaiian and Mexican
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's grabbing grub from all around the globe! In Wilmington, Delaware, there's a true British pub serving authentic English staples from fish and chips to Yorkshire pudding.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Spinning the Globe
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's checking out joints putting their own spin on global flavour. In Kauai, Hawaii, a culinary dojo ampin' up local specialties like saimin and chile pepper chicken. An outrageous twist on tacos and burritos in Kansas City, Mo.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Pied to Fried
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's travelling the nation and digging into all kinds of killer grub. In St. Petersburg, Florida, a lights-out spot is loading up the righteous ramen, and a New Orleans smokehouse puts out Big Easy favourites.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Where's the Beef?
programme.desc: It's all about the beef on this trip as Guy Fieri pops into a classic diner in Marietta, Georgia, for a taste of what's topping the charts these days. Next, it's on to San Antonio where a carwash-laundromat-kitchen combo is crankin' out killer burgers.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: From The Sea
programme.desc: Guy Fieri heads back to see what the Triple D Nation is cookin' up from under the sea. For starters, an oyster shuckin' shack is putting a new spin on an old favorite in the Big Easy.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: International Affair
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is circling the globe starting in Salt Lake City where a Vietnamese sandwich shop has exploded with six locations around town. In San Antonio, Texas, a Greek chef is whipping up real-deal Mexican for breakfast, lunch and dinner.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Layered, Stuffed and Stacked
programme.desc: It's a feeding frenzy on this trip, as Guy Fieri first stops in to see an old buddy in Kansas City, Mo., who's got new spots and a secret menu of sandwiches that are not so secret anymore.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Global Goodies
programme.desc: Guy takes a walk down memory lane to check on some of his favorite DDD finds. He gets a second helping at his first Peruvian place in Chicago. In Seattle, tradition stands firm at an old school chili parlor. Plus, local dives in Minneapolis and Portland.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Buffalo Chicken Statement Salad
programme.desc: Rachael believes that salads shouldn't be limited to small bowls and sidelines, so she makes a huge buffalo chicken and blue ranch statement salad that's perfect for a dinner party or a big game night.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Reunited and It Tastes So Good
programme.desc: Some of the best reunions are last minute – life gets so busy, but we still want to make time for our friends! Today, my pal Mackenzie Phillips and I are having a spontaneous get-together, and I'm prepping a few dishes that are quick but super impressive.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Flavors That Whisk You Away
programme.desc: The gang takes a tropical trip and Katie Lee begins with her slow cooker Hawaiian pulled pork, then Jeff Mauro serves up a crispy hash brown crusted halibut and Chef Tino Feliciano stops by with a Puerto Rican-style cilantro citrus roasted chicken.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Guilty Pleasures
programme.desc: Inspired by their favourite guilty-pleasure treats, Trisha Yearwood cooks a meal of indulgent foods for her friends, Glenda and Callie. The menu includes loaded Southern disco fries and the most over-the-top party burger.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Pizza Friday
programme.desc: It's Pizza Friday on the farm, and Molly Yeh and her husband, Nick, are hosting friends for dinner. Molly's making two pizzas using the same delicious dough recipe: sausage and kale pizza and squash and ricotta pizza with fresh squash from the farm.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home 4
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is tackling two days and three great breakfast dishes on the ranch with the help of her kids behind the cameras. First, she shares a fabulous Hash Brown Breakfast Pizza and divinely easy French Toast Roll-Ups.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Ranch Games
programme.desc: The family that plays together stays together. Ree, Ladd and the extended family get together for some good ol' friendly ranch style sporting competition. Afterwards, there's tangy tomato brisket, onion strings, and cheesy, blanched broccoli.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Sweet Treats
programme.desc: The Kitchen is whipping up nothing but sweet treats. Geoffrey shares a recipe for a quick caramelized apple tart and Katie Lee includes a surprise ingredient in chocolate chip cookies. Baker Samantha Seneviratne shares her recipe for maple cream pie.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Breaking Bread with Julie
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood invites her longtime friend, Julie, into the kitchen for a day celebrating all things bread. As they swap childhood bread-making stories, they create a tasty menu.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Incredible Vegetables
programme.desc: Ina's turning ordinary vegetables into extraordinary dishes.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Family Food Feud
programme.desc: Two families are going head-to-head in the market in the ultimate Family Food Feud, worth up to $20,000. First, one member of each family must prepare their best pork dish using a grocery list of the Fieri family's favourites ingredients.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Family Food Feud: Part 2
programme.desc: It's a family affair in Flavortown when two restaurant-owning families compete for a chance at a $20,000 shopping spree. Each round, the families must choose one member to compete in a challenge that will earn a key advantage in the next round.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Clearance Wars
programme.desc: Everything in Flavortown must go, and Guy Fieri has the perfect solution: a clearance war! He gives four chefs a list of clearance items that they must use over the course of the competition.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: No-Shop Showdown
programme.desc: For the first time in GGG history, none of the competing chefs get to shop for their ingredients. Instead, Guy Fieri gives them each a cart full of groceries that has to last all three rounds, and he decides what they make in each round.

programme.desc: Darlene is going away to college in Chicago and, as a result, Roseanne is faced with saying goodbye to another daughter. In the hope of keeping Darlene from moving, David makes a last minute attempt and proposes marriage.

programme.title: Roseanne: The Mommy's Curse

programme.title: Roseanne: Party Politics
programme.desc: Roseanne suspects that Darlene and DJ are teaming up against her. Fred attempts to win Jackie back.

programme.title: Roseanne: A Stash From the Past

programme.title: River Monsters: Flesh Ripper
programme.desc: New Zealand's freshwaters have been a safe place for swimmers, yet as Jeremy finds out, its remote rivers and deep lakes provide refuge for an ancient and slippery predator that has stayed hidden for more than a century.

programme.title: River Monsters: Vampires of the Deep
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade embarks on a punishing mission to the heart of a thundering waterfall in the Pacific Northwest to battle an ancient river monster said to rise from the murky depths to attack swimmers.

programme.title: River Monsters: Colombian Slasher
programme.desc: Angler Jeremy Wade pushes himself and his gear past breaking point to discover what killed a bride in the Colombian Amazon.

programme.title: River Monsters: Deadliest Man-Eaters: Australian Aquatic Terror
programme.desc: In Australia, a chainsaw-like predator and freshwater shark terrorizes its rivers. Jeremy Wade must battle treacherous conditions and encounters a real-life 'Crocodile Dundee' in order to solve a two-decade mystery.

programme.title: River Monsters: Terror in Paradise
programme.desc: Jeremy travels to the Bahamas after hearing tales of swimmers being ripped from the surface of blue holes surrounding the island; locals attribute the tragic disappearances to the legendary Lusca monster.

programme.title: River Monsters: Death Down Under
programme.desc: When six men vanish in the remote waters of northern Australia, extreme angler Jeremy Wade travels to the scene and embarks on one of his toughest investigations yet, taking on some of the deadliest animals on the planet in his search for a suspect.

programme.title: River Monsters: Legend of Loch Ness
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is on a mission to track down the famous monster of Loch Ness and to succeed where so many have failed. The journey takes him from the depths of Loch Ness to the volcanoes of Iceland, all in pursuit of the mother of all monsters.

programme.title: River Monsters: Rift Valley Killers
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to Africa's Rift Valley to explore the roots of fishing and the monsters the first fishermen faced; it's a dangerous place filled with killer crocs, hippos and warring gangs, but at its heart is a worthy prize: the Nile perch.

programme.title: River Monsters: Flesh Ripper
programme.desc: New Zealand's freshwaters have been a safe place for swimmers, yet as Jeremy finds out, its remote rivers and deep lakes provide refuge for an ancient and slippery predator that has stayed hidden for more than a century.

programme.desc: A new elephant calf, Indali, is born but her young half-sister Nandita doesn't welcome the new arrival. Plus, bush dog dad Franco is under pressure as his family grows, and Apple, an onager, a very rare type of wild horse, faces a major operation.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Courtship of the Jaguars
programme.desc: Mr. Parsons the chameleon is about to meet new mate. Jaguars Napo and Goshi are being encouraged to mate, but Napo doesn't seem to be interested. Young giraffe Murchison faces the great outdoors. Nandita the 18-month-old elephant has a surprise.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: High Risk Pregnancy
The Aquarium: Four Chicks and Counting
programme.desc: The African penguin colony welcome their newest additions after a successful mating season. Sea otter Mara is introduced to the rest of the raft, and the wild bottlenose dolphin population in Florida is examined.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Seal the Deal
programme.desc: Two African penguins, Freya and Neo, welcome a young chick, but there's cause for concern when health problems arise. Staff work to train a trio of harbor seals to ride the elevator, with the only hiccup being a nervous seal named Floyd.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Mek Comes Home
programme.desc: After six years away, Mek the tiger returns to the Zoo. Two shy tree kangaroos, Spike and Polly, meet for the first time. And, with the Children's Zoo under construction, the keepers have to move over 100 animals, including a herd of reluctant goats.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Penguin Chick Swim School
programme.desc: Safari Park keepers say goodbye to two elephant brothers. We find out if the San Diego Zoo vets can design a custom shoe for Felix, an excitable three-toed baird's tapir. Then, two African Penguin chicks grow up and get ready to join the colony.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Mkhaya Discovers Her Trunk
programme.desc: Mkhaya, the youngest baby elephant in the Safari Park herd, learns to use her trunk. Will Alba the Andean bear become a first-time mom? Zoo vets examine Mandazzi the gorilla, and Jeff the snake chaser looks for he elusive costal patch nose snake.

programme.title: The Zoo: Moving Day
programme.desc: The Zoo's huge male sea lion is in rut, and staff need to move the younger males before he comes territorial. The veterinary team come up with an ingenious solution to repair Dinky the Flamingo's broken ankle. And feeding a rock python proves challenging.

programme.title: The Zoo: Love Shack
programme.desc: To help love bloom between two kiwis, zoo staff build an elaborate hut into which they introduce a pair of potential mates. When a king cobra arrives at the zoo, keepers have their hands full training him to move from the exhibit to a holding pen.

programme.title: The Zoo: An Elephant's Trust
programme.desc: Trust and experience are put to the test when an elephant requires delicate veterinary treatment from her keepers. Endangered pink pigeons need all the help they can get to produce offspring. Monty the adorable otter needs to visit the dentist.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Getting Testy
programme.desc: When Savannah makes a proposal to Todd, one that would allow her go to college a year early, he wages an all-out family competition to keep her at home as long as possible, and Chase pays the price by having Todd as his ACT coach.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: My Chrisley Valentine

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Rules of Engagement

programme.title: Jessie: Cattle Calls and Scary Walls

programme.title: Raven's Home: The Falcon and the Raven

programme.title: Raven's Home: The Falcon and the Raven

programme.title: The Simpsons: Duffless

programme.desc: Remembering Homer's life after he is injured by Bart's April Fool's Day prank.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Marge in Chains

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: New World Secrets
programme.desc: Rob investigates a cluster of ancient ruins in New England that suggest Europeans arrived in the Americas almost 1,000 years before Columbus. Then, he heads to California where a dormant super volcano may be showing new signs of life.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mass Grave Under Pennsylvania
programme.desc: Rob hunts for a legendary mass grave that could expose a dark secret of America's industrial past. High in the mountains, a giant lake is mysteriously disappearing, and Rob uses cutting-edge technology to find out why.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Atlantis in America
programme.desc: New theories claim that the legendary sunken city of Atlantis could have actually been in the Americas. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to investigate evidence that might shed more light on one of the world's greatest mysteries.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Texan Mass Extinction
programme.desc: Rob Nelson descends into a cave 30 feet beneath Texas in search of evidence of a mass extinction event. Then, he heads to Lake Michigan to investigate an unexplained, Bermuda Triangle-like phenomenon that has caused ships to disappear for centuries.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mystery of the Serpent Mound
programme.desc: Rob explores mysterious tunnels beneath Denver's airport, the capitol building, and downtown to investigate rumors of a secret organization that operates below. In Ohio, he tries to uncover the ancient secrets of a giant mound shaped like a serpent.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Killing Meriwether Lewis
programme.desc: Meriwether Lewis was the man who teamed with William Clark to map the lands west of the Mississippi, but he died in mysterious circumstances. Experts reveal a vast conspiracy that could prove that one of America's greatest explorers was murdered.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Finding the Fountain of Youth
programme.desc: The legend of the Fountain of Youth might finally be explained by hidden messages encoded in a 500-year-old map, and using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts explore forgotten caves and perilous waters to reveal this mystery's long-lost secrets.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Curse of Superstition Mountains
programme.desc: New discoveries at the site of an alleged long-lost gold mine could lead investigators to a 200-million-dollar payday, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate clues in long-lost maps and relics to recover the Lost Dutchman's treasure.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Hunt for the Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: New clues taken from long-lost maps offer fresh leads in the hunt for the Ark of the Covenant, and using the latest hi-tech archaeological methods, experts retrace its steps through the Holy Land, Egypt, and Ethiopia to make a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Knights Templar in America
programme.desc: Mysterious new evidence suggests the Knights Templar fled Europe and rebuilt their fearsome warrior order in the Americas a century before Columbus, and experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate if long-lost relics confirm this game-changing theory.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Egypt's Land of the Gods
programme.desc: New evidence from one of the world's oldest maps offers clues to a long-lost civilization of untold treasure, and this cutting-edge expedition might finally prove that this mysterious kingdom is the ancestral home of the ancient Egyptians.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Mystery of the American Maya
programme.desc: New evidence suggests the Maya civilization did not suddenly vanish, but that they instead still survived, they just resettled in the United States. Using cutting-edge tech, experts reveal what really happened to these long-lost people.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Ghost Ship of the Damned
programme.desc: A long-lost treasure map claims to know the whereabouts of a missing ship buried with gold and silver in the California desert, and using cutting-edge technology, a team of experts use this new evidence to get close to a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Love Is War
programme.desc: A decorated marine faces war at home when he falls for a married woman. Suspicion and jealousy plague their affair as they battle to keep their secret from their spouses but with the stakes so high it's a truth they'll stop at nothing to hide.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Hell's Angel
programme.desc: When lonely teen Meagan Grunwald meets handsome 26-year-old felon Angel Garcia, it's love at first sight. But their whirlwind romance spirals into a hurricane of passion that leaves innocence destroyed and a trail of death and devastation in its path.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Sex and the Married Man
programme.desc: A married man embarks on a forbidden relationship with his 14-year-old babysitter. When his wife finds out, he will stop at nothing to keep his affair secret from the police.

programme.title: A Bloody Break-Up
programme.desc: When the flames of a new relationship burn a bit too bright too fast, it can be deadly.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Death of an Internet Star
programme.desc: When a young fashion designer and mother of three becomes a YouTube star with her online sewing tutorials, the money starts rolling in. But her obsessive and violent ex-boyfriend isn't prepared to let her rise to the top without him in her life.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Murder Goes Live
programme.desc: When a single mother tries to move on from her open relationship, she unwittingly gets into a war of words with her boyfriend's lover. As the online insults begin to escalate, he takes matters into his own hands with devastating. consequences.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Social Media Butterfly
programme.desc: When a beautiful young woman moves to New York City, a chance encounter leads to romance. But her new boyfriend finds her popularity on social media hard to swallow. A tragic chain of events unfolds in which her unique tattoo plays a critical role.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Dangerous Games
programme.desc: Brilliant schoolboy Breck Bednar has a passion for computers and gaming. But when he's introduced to a successful entrepreneur online, passion turns to obsession and the game becomes deadly.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Love Goes South
programme.desc: Lonely musician Ray Merrill thinks he's found his dream woman in Brazil through an online dating website. But as the exotic romance heats up, money starts to go missing.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Searching for Mr. Wrong
programme.desc: Nikki McPhatter has a busy work and social life, but there's only one thing missing true love. When she doesn't show up for her usual work shift, her friends and family immediately worry -- and point to her online relationships.

programme.title: A Bloody Break-Up
programme.desc: When the flames of a new relationship burn a bit too bright too fast, it can be deadly.

programme.title: Diabolical: Accident Waiting to Happen
programme.desc: Rainey Morin is a single mom who's finally found her soulmate. Robert Kowalski treats Rainey like a queen and her kids like gold, but beneath his bright veneer is a dark history threatening to wreak havoc.

programme.title: Diabolical: The Rich Get Richer
programme.desc: Penny Knell is admitted to a special care facility, where a devious mastermind is waiting to prey upon society's most vulnerable. When Penny's family gets caught in her web, the consequences will be fatal.

programme.title: See No Evil: At Michelle's Door
programme.desc: The News Year's disappearance of Michelle Thornton leads to a gruesome discovery. With no witnesses, only the four security cameras from her apartment building can help decipher what happened.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Graveyard Shift
programme.desc: On October 1st, 2009, 37-year-old Natasha Cournoyer disappears without a trace in Laval, Canada. As her friends and family struggle for answers, detectives must follow a stone-cold trail to uncover her final footsteps caught on surveillance cameras.

programme.title: See No Evil: No Good Deed
programme.desc: On September 28th 2014, Diane Cunningham is bludgeoned to death in her bedroom. The only clues are receipts from Walmart, a ferry crossing, and a casino. Security footage reveals a prime suspect with a motive, but not everything is quite as it seems.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Long Walk Home
programme.desc: A father-to-be is shot while out for a morning walk, leaving his wife a widow. Security footage from the scene reveals his final, shocking moments.

programme.title: See No Evil: A Date with Dalene
programme.desc: On August 6th 2011, Dalene Carlson vanishes during a Saturday night on the town. Security footage from a local bar reveals a number of potential suspects, each with a motive.

programme.title: See No Evil: Someone to Watch Over Her
programme.desc: On a freezing winter night, a hardworking mother doesn't make it home from work. As dawn breaks, her body is found in a churchyard. With the city in panic, Police turn to the city's surveillance cameras... hoping they can help catch a brutal murderer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Must Find Mickey
programme.desc: 21-year-old Mickey Shunick is missing after a night out. Her family is terrified and mobilizes the local community to help search for her. Police are unable to find any trace of the Louisiana student -- until they spot her on surveillance video...

programme.title: See No Evil: Breakdown at Daylight
programme.desc: 17-year old Casey Crowder vanished early one Sunday morning after her car ran out of gas outside of Dumas, Arkansas. With no leads and no witnesses, investigators are desperate to find any CCTV cameras that can lead them to the missing teen.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Air McNair
programme.desc: Retired NFL superstar Steve McNair is found shot to death along with his young mistress. Pat Postigilone reveals the true story of his investigation and its shocking conclusion, which has become the most talked about murder mystery in Nashville history.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Truck Stop
programme.desc: The deceased body of a young mother is found naked and gruesomely displayed inside a public truck stop near downtown Nashville. Sergeant Postiglione uncovers a trail of evidence across multiple states that lead him to a serial killer.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Cris-Cross
programme.desc: In 2004, Detective Postiglione investigates the rare double homicide of two young college students in an apartment near a Nashville university. When a third victim is gunned down, a state-wide manhunt in launched to find the killer.

programme.title: Shadow Ops: Reagan's Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Vladimir Vetrov was a top KGB spy until he betrayed his country and became a secret agent for the West. Codenamed 'Farewell' he would become America's single greatest asset in the US-Soviet spy war.

programme.title: Shadow Ops: Escape From Moscow
programme.desc: KGB Colonel turned double agent Oleg Gordievsky has spent ten years spying for Britain's secret service, MI6. Now the Soviets are on to him. His only hope for survival is to attempt a daring exfiltration plan.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Plastic Surgery
programme.desc: Courtenay Savage is an ex-cop with a loaded gun aimed at a friend's trailer. She has no idea she is caught on tape. After an arrest and posting bail, she goes on the run, leaving ties to the police department and the sex industry.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Revenge
programme.desc: Marshall Brown was 19 when he committed his first contract killing. A drug dealer put a hit out on Horace Morrison. Brown was soon convicted and spent the next 19 years in prison planning his escape. This is the story of his life on the run.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Kill my Step-Dad
programme.desc: When teenager Randy Baggett can't take any more of his abusive stepfather, he gets help from a friend and they beat and choke him to death. Two years later, Randy gets locked up, but he escapes twice, keeping police and detectives on their toes.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Ride the Rails
programme.desc: A neighbour calls 911 when she smells smoke coming from an apartment shared by Ricky Sleight and William Baldi. The police find Baldi's dead body, but Sleight escapes by riding freight trains across the country. The FBI turns to the media for help.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Rich Widow
programme.desc: Brian Maurice Fuller charms his way into wealthy people's homes, only to rob them blind. He gets caught, does his time and is released. But Fuller can't resist the lure of robbing the rich. He eludes police until a tip leads them right to his door.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Kill my Step-Dad
programme.desc: When teenager Randy Baggett can't take any more of his abusive stepfather, he gets help from a friend and they beat and choke him to death. Two years later, Randy gets locked up, but he escapes twice, keeping police and detectives on their toes.

programme.title: Mafia vs. JFK
programme.desc: Florida and Cuba were ruled by top don Santo Trafficante. The King of Cuba's casinos was on the verge of mob stardom when a revolution destroys his plans. It results in a secret alliance between the mob and the CIA and a failed assassination attempt.

programme.title: Mob Boss: Vito Genovese
programme.desc: The story of Vito Genovese, who ruthlessly dealt with disloyalty in the Mafia and quickly rose to prominence, but unwittingly caused his own downfall.

programme.title: The Mob Rat: Joe Valachi
programme.desc: The story of hitman Joe Valachi, the first Mafia member to break the code of silence and turn public informer.

programme.title: The Real Don of New York
programme.desc: Under the disguise of mental illness, Vincent Gigante evaded the authorities and rose to become the most powerful mobster in New York. When FBI realised their mistake, they would stop at nothing to take him down.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: Yukon Gold Rush War
programme.desc: This epic Gold Rush showdown pits legendary conman Jefferson 'Soapy' Smith and his loyal 'Soap Gang' against town organizer-turned vigilante Frank Reid and the Committee of 101, in a battle to bring justice to the lawless Alaskan Frontier.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: This notorious feud is one of the largest street wars in history. William Poole ('Bill the Butcher') rules New York's viciously anti-immigrant nativist gang, but the Bowery Boys challenge their hold.

programme.title: Hatfields vs. McCoys
programme.desc: The Hatfields feud with the McCoys is one of the most notorious feuds in American history. What starts as Civil War hostility rapidly escalates to kidnapping, illicit love affairs, murder and a nation-wide turf war.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Devil Incarnate
programme.desc: Born in Honduras, Juan Ramon Matta Ballesteros became one of the richest cocaine smugglers in history. Ballesteros masterminded a supply route into the US, which fed much of the cocaine and crack epidemic of the 70's and 80's.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: American Gangster
programme.desc: Frank Lucas was one of the most successful heroin dealers of the 1970's. His brand of heroin known as 'Blue Magic' was notorious on the streets of New York and New Jersey.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Black Widow
programme.desc: A cocaine empire triggers a tidal wave of deaths across the United States. Behind this rampage is a bloodthirsty female psychopath who kills for fun. Known as The Black Widow, this is the true story of Griselda Blanco and how she's brought to justice.

programme.desc: A look back at when leather clad hoods turned the motorcycle into a symbol of violence.

programme.desc: A growing family finds a seaside fixer upper in Surfside Beach, Texas.
