programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: One Good Deed Deserves Another
programme.desc: A woman who lost her husband, the neighborhood 'Good Samaritan,' needs help completing many of the DIY projects he had started around the house. So Next Generation is stepping in, and stepping up, to 'Make Things Right' for the widow.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Far From Home
programme.desc: A couple relocating to a different part of the city needs help updating their kitchen before putting their house on the market. After a local contractor let them down and drained their budget, Next Generation swoops in to 'make things right.'

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: And Baby Makes Three
programme.desc: Mike Holmes and his kids tackle a renovation that has fallen off the tracks for expectant parents. Next Generation is on a time-sensitive mission to finish the nursery and only working bathroom in the house prior to the baby's arrival.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Old Is New Again
programme.desc: John and Tanya purchased a 171-year-old home after a contractor guaranteed it had been totally updated. They're concerned someone is going to fall through their family room floor. Mike and his kids step in and work to make the space safe again.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Nightmares and Dreams
programme.desc: A marathon runner hired a contractor to design her perfect kitchen, but he was unqualified and ended up compromising the home's structure. Now it's up to Mike and his kids to make things right and restore her peace of mind.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Ozark Mountain Lodge
programme.desc: An adventurous couple builds a home with self-sustaining features near the Ozark National Forest. While they both have renovation experience, building on the dangerous mountainside terrain in a location plagued by flash foods will be a challenge.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Georgia Mountain Treehouse
programme.desc: A couple sets out to create their dream treehouse retreat in Northern Georgia overlooking the Blue Ridge Mountains. Although the build calls for a mile-long, uphill trek with their materials, the end result is the ultimate childhood dream come true.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Smoky Mountain Homestead
programme.desc: A family of five builds a forever home on their 46-acre property overlooking the Smoky Mountains.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Lake Superior Lodge
programme.desc: A couple races to finish a modern, off-grid lodge overlooking the south shores of Lake Superior.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Rocky Mountain Homestead
programme.desc: With the help of a small crew, Cal and Billy Joe battle the elements as they race to finish Cal's cabin in time for hunting season. However, an unexpected setback threatens to halt the project entirely.

programme.title: The Great Food Truck Race: Back Nine Barbecue
programme.desc: Eight teams arrive at the Harbour Town Golf Links on Hilton Head Island, where they are mandated to sell classic Carolina barbecue. Then the teams head to Shelter Cove for two days of selling to hungry locals and tourists alike.

programme.title: The Great Food Truck Race: Fast and Furious
programme.desc: The teams race toward the checkered flag of the Daytona International Speedway. A shrimp challenge tests the teams, but with one team losing members unexpectedly and another incurring a health code violation, Daytona becomes anyone's race to win.

programme.title: The Great Food Truck Race: Tampa 911
programme.desc: The teams arrive in Tampa, Florida where they are met by a group of police officers. They are there to judge a contest based on Tampa's gift to the culinary world: the Cuban sandwich. One team struggles with finding a good location to sell in the city.

programme.title: The Great Food Truck Race: Burger Brawl
programme.desc: Tyler gives the five remaining food truck teams a terrifying gator challenge in Fort Myers, Florida. They have to step up their game with a burger that takes creative risks and face a secret chef judge.

programme.title: The Great Food Truck Race: Shake Showdown
programme.desc: Tyler makes the four remaining food truck teams throw javelins to determine their protein in a skewer challenge. A Sonic Drive-In shake challenge puts everyone's sweet skills to the test and an elimination twist changes everything.

programme.title: The Great Food Truck Race: Miami Meltdown
programme.desc: Tyler spends time with each food truck in Miami, Florida to see what makes them tick. The teams must create a crowd-pleasing pork dish and an innovative coffee creation. With the finale so close, tensions flare up like never before.

programme.title: The Great Food Truck Race: Key Lime Clash
programme.desc: Tyler meets the final two food trucks as they go head-to-head in sunny Key West, FL. A spiny lobster, a key lime challenge and an unexpected visitor galvanize the teams to give it their all in the final push. One team walks away with the big prize.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Cheese Glorious Cheese
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro proves that no matter how you slice it, cheese just makes everything better. Find out how TGI Fridays' cheddar bacon potato skin appetizer gets turned into a yummy chip and how Mom Made Cheesy Mac tastes.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Movie Munchies
programme.desc: It's movie munchies madness as host Alfonso Ribeiro goes behind the scenes of blockbuster sweets like Dots and Cookie Dough Bites.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Barbecue Sides
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro puts together the perfect backyard barbecue, including Mrs. Freshley's melt-in-your-mouth cupcakes, Mrs. Fisher's perfectly-salted rippled chips, and Mayfield Dairy's creamy banana split ice cream.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Crunchy
programme.desc: Host Alfonso Ribeiro explores snacks that know how to put that little crunch in your munch, like See's Candies peanut brittle and Snak King's crispy Taco Litos.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Colorful Candies
programme.desc: From delightfully twisted Red Vines to the multicolored Mike and Ikes and multi-flavored Jelly Bellies, join us for a Willy Wonka style tour of treats.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Melting Pot
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro serves up a made-in-the-USA, multicultural menu. A family-run Philadelphia factory for the secrets of an authentic Italian cannoli.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Tex-Mex
programme.desc: Roger Mooking travels across America searching for the 12 best Tex-Mex dishes from beans, meats and peppers to salsas and gooey cheeses.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Fried
programme.desc: From seafood and beef to pork and cheese, all the best foods taste better fried and Roger Mooking is scouring the country in search of the 12 best fried-food dishes. He's hanging out with fried-food-loving chefs learning all their secrets.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Roadside 'Cue
programme.desc: While road-tripping through Texas, Roger Mooking pulls the car over for some seriously delicious barbecue. In San Antonio, he makes a pit stop at The Box Street Social food truck to hang chickens and racks of ribs over a live fire.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: A Tale of Two BBQs
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits an old-school barbecue institution serving chopped pork in South Carolina and a popular restaurant serving Hill County barbecue classics in Texas.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Twist On Texas 'cue
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits two restaurants in the Lone Star State that turn traditional Texas-style barbecue into crafty culinary creations.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Hog Wild And Shuckling Delicious
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is firing up three different rigs to cook a whole hog, racks of ribs and bushels of oysters for the ultimate South Carolina-style surf and turf.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Texas 'Cue-Step in Georgia
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is in the Peach State visiting two self-taught pitmasters who smoke tasty Texas-style barbecue.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Light My Latin Fire
programme.desc: Roger Mooking fires up two delicioso Latin-inspired feasts. In St. Augustine, Fla., Roger meets Nick Carrera, a grill master and grill maker behind Urban Asado. They roast whole lambs and vegetables on Nick's asado crosses.

programme.title: Good Eats: American Classics X: Chicken Parm
programme.desc: Alton Brown makes the argument that Italian food was actually invented in America, and that chicken parmesan is the dish where it all began. Yet, an Italian canned tomato makes it all possible.

programme.title: Good Eats: Olive Me
programme.desc: Alton demystifies the flavourful little olive, which has changed the course of history.

programme.title: Good Eats: Fry Hard III: Fry, Tempura, Fry!
programme.desc: Alton Brown takes on the most mythic, magical, but often times monstrous form of frying known to modern man.

programme.title: Good Eats: The Catfish Will Rise Again
programme.desc: Alton Brown sets out to modernize the image of the catfish.

programme.desc: Nervous about meeting his girlfriend's parents, Max enlists help from Phoebe, whose charms ultimately backfire and leave Max banned from ever seeing his girlfriend again.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Date of Emergency
programme.desc: Phoebe fakes a romance after feeling left out with her friends all in relationships, but keeping her lie going proves to be harder than she expected.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Smells Like Team Spirit
programme.desc: Phoebe and Max must work together on series of superhero team building exercises, but their different approaches to training puts their future as a crime fighting team at risk.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Popcorn Monster/ Game of Drones
programme.desc: While trying to create two identical pieces of popcorn, Ray and Henry accidentally bring to life the Popcorn Monster. To help Ray win the Swellview Drone Dash against Dr. Minyak, Schwoz hatches a plan: shrink Kid Danger and have him pilot his own drone.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Octo-Charlotte/ Trouble in Tropikini
programme.desc: Schwoz accidentally morphs Charlotte into half girl/ half octopus, Captain Man and Kid Danger work to change her back but first they must catch her. The group's vacation is cut short when Jasper falls into a volcano and is held captive by the Volcaniacs.

programme.title: DuckTales: Beware the B.U.D.D.Y. System
programme.desc: Feeling menaced by tech genius Mark Beaks' newest invention, Launchpad recruits brilliant young scientist Fenton.

programme.title: DuckTales: Happy Birthday, Doofus Drake!
programme.desc: Louie and Goldie crash Doofus' birthday party to con their way into some million dollar gift bags as Della trains Huey in her favourite online game.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Tilly Tour/ Dinner Party
programme.desc: Tilly takes Gramma out to be a tourist for a day. Cricket and Remy arrange a dinner party for everyone to get to know each other.

programme.title: Amphibia: Civil Wart/ Hop-Popular
programme.desc: Anne exposes Wartwood to a teen romance film, and the town is split on the movie's love triangle. After losing his stand, Hop Pop decides to run for mayor of Wartwood.

programme.title: The Owl House: The Intruder
programme.desc: Luz and King must defend The Owl House from a mysterious intruder.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Lost Harp of Mervana!
programme.desc: The family joins a zen mermaid society to find a missing mystery, but Louie is convinced the seemingly innocent mermaids have a villainous agenda of their own.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Swimming Fool/ Tilly's Goat
programme.desc: When the Greens visit an indoor pool, Cricket is challenged to jump off the high-dive. Tilly claims that their goat has the spirit of a dog and enters it in a dog show.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Shark Objects / Dream Weaver
programme.desc: When Greens try to spend an eventful day at the beach, Cricket tries to prank the beach-goers; Cricket discovers he can influence the family's dreams to disastrous real-life results.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Garage Tales/ Animal Farm
programme.desc: After finding a box of mementos, Gramma tells the kids the story of her greatest adventure. While the Greens are away, the animals compete to see who will rule the farm.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gramma's License/ Bear Trapped
programme.desc: When Gramma crashes into a parked police car, she loses her driver’s license and her confidence. Cricket Green hates bears.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Family Legacy/ Paint Misbehavin'
programme.desc: Gramma tells Cricket and Tilly that there’s treasure buried on their property.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gridlocked/ Mama Bird
programme.desc: Bill brings the family out to the country for a road trip, but a traffic jam halts their plans. Tilly finds a bird's nest and tries to raise the chicks as her own, but they choose Cricket.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Level Up/ Wild Side
programme.desc: Bill gets addicted to a farm-simulating video game. Cricket's feral wild side takes over when Bill is unable to replicate their old camping trips.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Breaking News / Cyberbullies
programme.desc: When Bill grows a huge watermelon, Cricket invites the local news to see the mega melon. Cricket stands up to the cyberbullying of three online gamers known as the Cyber Knights.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Impopstar/ Football Camp
programme.desc: Cricket is mistaken for a pop star and decides to exploit the situation for all the perks of fame.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Place/ Volunteer Tilly
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Legend of the Gobblewonker
programme.desc: The twins embark on a mission to prove that a legendary sea monster exists at the bottom of the local lake. Soos helps them on a boating mission to prove it exists.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Society of the Blind Eye
programme.desc: The kids, along with Old Man McGucket's help, discover there is a secret society on Gravity Falls.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Day/ The Night
programme.desc: Sylvia awakens to find Wander asleep and imprisoned on Hater’s ship, and must fight to escape while managing a sleeping Wander.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Party Animal/ The Toddler
programme.desc: Sylvia intervenes when Emperor Awesome's partying threatens to destroy a planet.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Big Job/ The Helper

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Rider

programme.desc: When Mandy job shadows Mike at The Outdoor Man, her textbook conflict resolution skills differ from Mike's experience-based approach; and she unintentionally causes a dispute between Chuck and Joe.

programme.title: Movie: Black Knight
programme.desc: An amusement park employee suffers a blow to the head and awakens in the 14th century.

programme.title: Movie: This Means War
programme.desc: Two CIA agents wage war against each other when they find out they have been dating the same woman.

programme.title: Movie: School of Rock
programme.desc: Kicked out of his rock band, flat broke and lacking any job skills whatsoever, Dewey Finn fakes his way into a job as a substitute teacher at a stuffy private school. Once there, he teaches the kids about rock and roll.

programme.title: Movie: John Tucker Must Die
programme.desc: A group of girls team up to get revenge on a boy who was sneaking around on all of them.

programme.title: Movie: LOL
programme.desc: A mom strives to reconnect with her teen daughter after reading her racy journal.

programme.title: Movie: Bedazzled
programme.desc: A dweeb is granted seven wishes by the devil to help him snare the girl of his dreams.

programme.title: Movie: Witless Protection
programme.desc: A small town sheriff tries to rescue a girl who he thought was being kidnapped. He learns that the kidnappers are FBI agents who are actually trying to kill the girl.

programme.title: Movie: One Fine Day
programme.desc: Two busy single parents get to know each other over the course of a mishap-filled day.

programme.title: Movie: Big Top Pee-Wee
programme.desc: Pee-Wee Herman joins a circus troupe as they put on a really big show.

programme.title: Movie: Someone Like You
programme.desc: After being dumped, a talk-show talent scout assumes the identity of a psychoanalyst and writes a scathing column about men.

programme.title: Movie: The Kitchen
programme.desc: A group of gangsters are locked up and their wives continue the running of their illicit enterprises in 1970s Hell's Kitchen.

programme.title: Movie: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: Two years after the Las Vegas bachelor party, the guys head to Thailand for Stu's wedding. However, Stu's plans for a quiet brunch are derailed.

programme.title: Movie: Wild Hogs
programme.desc: A group of middle-aged men try to put their troubles behind them as they set out on a road trip on their Harleys.

programme.title: Movie: Ready or Not
programme.desc: A new bride's sinister in-laws force her to take part in a dangerous game.

programme.title: Movie: Rock the Kasbah
programme.desc: A has-been rock manager gets stranded in Afghanistan, where he discovers a young girl with a beautiful singing voice. Sure that she could win a national singing competition, he takes her on an adventure-of-a-lifetime in the hopes of reviving his career.

programme.title: Longhorn Arts & Culture: LBJ Summit on Race: Motown, Sixty Years of 'Hitsville, USA'
programme.desc: Four Motown legends speak on the history and influence of the music, decades of memories and the crucial role that Motown played in integrating America.

programme.title: T.J.
programme.desc: A look at how T.J. Ford made Austin, Texas, a basketball town and how he laid the foundation for Texas' basketball future. Ford changed the perception of what Texas was, and what it could become.

programme.title: LHN Stories: XIX
programme.desc: Learn about lifetime Longhorns searching for inclusion in their sport. Plus, former Texas bigs discuss the art of the block in the NBA, and a relationship that crossed rival lines brought an NCAA title to Texas.
